title: helena × tenuior
intro: Helena × tenuior, also known as Chinese angelica, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and anticoagulant effects, as well as its ability to regulate blood sugar levels and reduce blood pressure. The health benefits of Helena × tenuior include reducing menstrual cramps and improving liver function, as well as its potential to prevent cancer and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Helena × tenuior is often used in teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is typically combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
